title: Run cancellation does not cancel child tasks
prompt: Review the TypeScript fixture and list correctness bugs.

requiredFindings.description: The loop finds running child tasks but never calls task.cancel(), leaving them running after the run is cancelled.
The function mutates the Run object in place before child task cancellation has succeeded, so callers can observe cancelled state while children continue running.

knownFalsePositives.description: Claims task ID order causes the cancellation bug.
